songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 5th nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 12 spots to #1.

songs.title: What's My Age Again?
feed: “What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 66 sales units.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 120 streams units.
“What's My Age Again?” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 256,956 total units.

songs.title: Breakaway
feed: “Breakaway” by Kelly Clarkson climbs inside the top 10 of Personal Hot 100, rising 63 spots to #7.
“Breakaway” by Kelly Clarkson is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 257% to 239 points.
“Breakaway” by Kelly Clarkson is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
